name: Solitaire Master-Classic Card
description: Solitaire by XT Studios is the new best way to play the classic card game you know and love for FREE, offline and online! The most popular card game in the world, classic Solitaire Master-Classic Card, also known as Patience, is a great way to relax and train your brain. With beautiful graphics, fun animations, and free, offline play, Solitaire is the best game to pass the time.
instructions: Solitaire Master uses a standard 52 card deck of playing cards without jokers The objective of the game is to expose all cards and move them into the foundation piles There are 4 foundation piles one for each suit that are represented on the screen by
tags: 1 Player, 2D, Android, Arcade, Boys, Card, Girls, Solitaire
